addons.name: YouTube UnBlock nikolaevevge
addons.fullDescription:
In today's digital world, YouTube has transformed how we access information and entertainment. With billions of videos covering every imaginable topic - from DIY home repairs to advanced coding tutorials - it's become an essential resource. But when internet providers block access, you need a smart solution. Our Firefox extension offers the most reliable way to bypass YouTube restrictions while keeping your browsing fast and secure.

What makes our tool different? It's designed for real people who just want their YouTube access back - no technical skills required. The moment you install it, you'll notice:

Instant one-click access to blocked YouTube content

No complicated setup or configuration needed

Automatic selection of the best unblocking method

Clear status indicators so you always know it's working

The technology behind our extension is what really sets it apart. While other solutions use just one method (and often get blocked themselves), we combine multiple advanced techniques:

Intelligent traffic masking that makes your YouTube usage invisible to ISPs

Smart domain switching to avoid detection

High-speed proxy connections when needed

DNS protection to prevent leaks

Unlike sketchy free VPN services that sell your data or bombard you with ads, our extension respects your privacy. We don't log your activity, slow down your connection, or show annoying pop-ups. It just works - quietly and efficiently in the background.

For students, our extension means uninterrupted access to educational content. Imagine trying to study for exams when suddenly all those helpful tutorial videos disappear. With our tool, you'll never lose access to the learning resources you depend on.

Content creators benefit too. If your income depends on YouTube, being blocked means losing your audience and livelihood. Our extension helps creators stay connected with their viewers no matter what restrictions come up.

Business professionals can't afford downtime either. Whether you're researching competitors, training employees, or sharing company videos, our extension keeps YouTube available when you need it most.

Even casual users will appreciate the ad-free experience our technology provides. No more interruptions from irrelevant commercials - just the videos you want to watch, when you want to watch them.

The extension automatically updates itself to stay ahead of new blocking methods. While other solutions stop working when ISPs change their filters, ours adapts to keep your access consistent.

Installation takes seconds: just add it to Firefox and you're done. The intuitive interface lets you turn it on or off with a single click whenever you need it. No confusing settings to adjust or accounts to create.

We've optimized every aspect for speed. Unlike VPNs that slow your connection to a crawl, our technology maintains fast streaming speeds so you can watch in HD without buffering.

Security was our top priority in development. The extension uses enterprise-grade encryption without storing any of your personal information. Your browsing stays private - we don't track what videos you watch or when you watch them.

For travelers, this is a must-have tool. Many hotels, airports, and public networks block YouTube. With our extension, you'll have access wherever you go - just like being at home.

Parents will appreciate that the extension works with YouTube's parental controls. It unblocks the site while still respecting any content restrictions you've set up for your family.

The technology is particularly valuable in areas with heavy internet censorship. Students, journalists, and activists rely on YouTube for uncensored information. Our extension helps maintain this crucial access.

Teachers can continue using YouTube for lesson plans and classroom materials without worrying about sudden blocks disrupting their curriculum.

Gamers benefit too - no more missing out on live streams, walkthroughs, or esports events because of regional restrictions.

Our development team constantly monitors new blocking techniques worldwide. Whenever ISPs roll out new restrictions, we update our technology to counter them - often before users even notice.

The extension works seamlessly across all YouTube features: videos, live streams, comments, playlists, and your personal subscriptions all remain fully accessible.

For the best experience, we recommend keeping the extension updated. New versions include performance improvements and additional unblocking methods to ensure reliable access.

Try it today and experience YouTube without limits. In just minutes, you'll be watching your favorite content again - no matter where you are or what restrictions your internet provider has put in place.

Remember: when other solutions fail, our Firefox extension keeps YouTube working. It's the smart choice for anyone who values reliable, private access to the world's largest video platform.

addons.name: Бесплатный обход блокировки YouTube в России
addons.description: Никаких VPN и прочего. Подменяет ссылки на видео так, что они открываются на сайте QnA.Center, где можно законно смотреть видео без VPN и тормозов. Это позволит обойти замедление YouTube в России.
addons.fullDescription:
Расширение работает только для видео в открытом доступе и завершенных трансляций, при условии что у вас виден хотя бы список видео.

Открывайте видео в новой вкладке. Не везде работает просто по нажатию на ссылку. Для этого:
- с компьютера: жмём правой кнопкой мыши, затем Открыть в новой вкладке
- с телефона: удерживаем палец на ссылке, затем Открыть в новой вкладке

В общем, если Вы всё ещё думаете как скачать видео с ютуба, смотреть ютуб, хотите ютуб бесплатно, ждёте ютуб в России - то это расширение для Вас. Также оно вполне подойдёт, если Вы думаете, как обойти блокировку ютуб, отключить замедление или убрать тормоза YouTube.

addons.name: Youtube Defender - Нет замедлению Youtube

addons.fullDescription:
Youtube Defender направляет YouTube трафик через прокси-сервер.
Остальные ссылки будут открываться без прокси, как обычно.

Что даёт Тубернет?

🎁Вы можете ежедневно получать бесплатные 💎Premium-коды в Telegram, которые откроют доступ ко всему интернету без ограничений!

Преимущества Тубернет:

Следите за новостями в Telegram: https://t.me/tubernet
Есть вопросы? Напишите нам: https://t.me/tubernet_bot

addons.name: Vimium
addons.description: The Hacker's Browser. Vimium provides keyboard shortcuts for navigation and control in the spirit of Vim.
addons.fullDescription:
Keyboard Bindings

Modifier keys are specified as <c-x>, <m-x>, and <a-x> for ctrl+x, meta+x, and alt+x respectively. See the next section for how to customize these bindings.

Once you have Vimium installed, you can see this list of key bindings at any time by typing ?.

Navigating the current page:

? show the help dialog for a list of all available keys
h scroll left
j scroll down
k scroll up
l scroll right
gg scroll to top of the page
G scroll to bottom of the page
d scroll down half a page
u scroll up half a page
f open a link in the current tab
F open a link in a new tab
r reload
gs view source
i enter insert mode -- all commands will be ignored until you hit Esc to exit
yy copy the current url to the clipboard
yf copy a link url to the clipboard
gf cycle forward to the next frame
gF focus the main/top frame

Navigating to new pages:

o Open URL, bookmark, or history entry
O Open URL, bookmark, history entry in a new tab
b Open bookmark
B Open bookmark in a new tab

Using find:

/ enter find mode
-- type your search query and hit enter to search, or Esc to cancel
n cycle forward to the next find match
N cycle backward to the previous find match

For advanced usage, see regular expressions on the wiki.

Navigating your history:

H go back in history
L go forward in history

Manipulating tabs:

J, gT go one tab left
K, gt go one tab right
g0 go to the first tab
g$ go to the last tab
^ visit the previously-visited tab
t create tab
yt duplicate current tab
x close current tab
X restore closed tab (i.e. unwind the 'x' command)
T search through your open tabs
<a-p> pin/unpin current tab

Using marks:

ma, mA set local mark "a" (global mark "A")
`a, `A jump to local mark "a" (global mark "A")
`` jump back to the position before the previous jump
-- that is, before the previous gg, G, n, N, / or `a

Additional advanced browsing commands:

]], [[ Follow the link labeled 'next' or '>' ('previous' or '<')
- helpful for browsing paginated sites
<a-f> open multiple links in a new tab
gi focus the first (or n-th) text input box on the page
gu go up one level in the URL hierarchy
gU go up to root of the URL hierarchy
ge edit the current URL
gE edit the current URL and open in a new tab
zH scroll all the way left
zL scroll all the way right
v enter visual mode; use p/P to paste-and-go, use y to yank
V enter visual line mode

Vimium supports command repetition so, for example, hitting 5t will open 5 tabs in rapid succession. <Esc> (or <c-[>) will clear any partial commands in the queue and will also exit insert and find modes.

There are some advanced commands which aren't documented here; refer to the help dialog (type ?) for a full list.

screenshots.caption: Type "f" to show a hint for every link on the page. Type the characters next to a link to click on that link, without using the mouse.
Type "?" to show the help dialog, with all available commands.
